prompt:
Edit REFERENCE 2 (the redesigned content 1 'How to Enter' poster). Find the small QR / QR-icon area near the bottom of the poster (next to the 'SCAN TO FIND OUT!' callout) and REPLACE it with a clearly visible, scannable QR code matching the EXACT QR pattern from REFERENCE 1 (a black-and-white QR code). Render the QR at a tasteful prominent size — clearly scannable, in pure black on a clean white square — at the same general location where the small QR icon currently sits. Every black module and every white module of REFERENCE 1's QR must be preserved PIXEL-PERFECT — do NOT add modules, remove modules, blur edges, dither, anti-alias the pattern, or invent any QR-like noise. Crisp, sharp, fully square, high contrast.

KEEP IDENTICAL: every other element of REFERENCE 2 — background, color palette, cityscape, Challenger, gold Muha 'M' logo, GIVEAWAY hero headline, 'Vice City' cursive subtag, the three numbered step phones with their app screenshots and labels, 'SCAN TO FIND OUT!' text, bottom disclaimer, lighting, color grade, vignette, film grain, layout, composition, framing, aspect ratio (2:3). Only the QR area changes.

Photorealistic-illustrated modern poster aesthetic, sharp focus, 2048×3072 / 4K. No additional text, no watermarks.

Edit REFERENCE 2 (the redesigned content 2 'How to Enter' poster) by REPLACING the QR code currently shown in REFERENCE 2 with the EXACT QR pattern from REFERENCE 1 (a black-and-white QR code). Crisp, sharp, fully square, high contrast (pure black on pure white). NO logos overlaid on the QR center.

KEEP IDENTICAL: every other element of REFERENCE 2 — background, palette, cityscape, Challenger, gold Muha 'M' logo, GIVEAWAY hero headline, 'Vice City' cursive subtag, '$25,000 CASH PRIZE + ALL-NEW DODGE CHALLENGER SRT' callout, three numbered step phones with their app screenshots and labels, 'SCAN TO FIND OUT!' callout, bottom disclaimer, parody-style 'Grand Theft Auto Vice City' badge, lighting, color grade, vignette, film grain, layout, composition, framing, aspect ratio (9:16). Photorealistic-illustrated modern poster aesthetic, sharp focus, 2160×3840 / 4K. No additional text, no watermarks.
